message:
fix(convoy): review followups — warm-up polling, error logging, store close errors

Code review fixes for the convoy manager rewrite:

- Replace seedHighWaterMarks (fetched ALL events) with warm-up polling:
  first pollAllStores cycle advances high-water marks without processing,
  preventing both the O(n) seed query and historical event replay burst.

- Add error logging to getTrackingConvoys so store query failures are
  visible instead of silently returning "no convoys found".

- Log store.Close() errors in ConvoyManager.Stop() instead of discarding.

- Update 7 tests to set m.seeded=true before polling, and fix
  getTrackingConvoys call site in store_test.go for new signature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
